cases.name: 1. flag off (default): no coupling notifications created
2. flag on + TENANT_JOB_FANOUT_ENABLED=false: refused; no notifications
3. flag on + TENANT_AWARE_JOBS_ENABLED=false: refused; no notifications
4. compliance pilot inactive: upstream refusal; no notifications
5. happy path: notifications created with tenantId=A only
6. tenant B users do not receive tenant A notifications
8. notification fan-out runs inside per-tenant ALS frame (tenantId stamped)
10. raw generateAlerts() body does NOT call notification fan-out
11. ComplianceCron body still calls only runScheduledComplianceAlertGeneration()
12. ComplianceScheduler body does not call notification helpers directly
